verses.english: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority.

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.english: Or has He daughters while you have sons?

verses.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.english: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

verses.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.english: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.english: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.

verses.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
verses.english: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

verses.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
verses.english: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -

verses.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.english: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.

verses.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.english: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise.

verses.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.english: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.

verses.arabic: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.english: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,

verses.arabic: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰٓ
verses.english: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.

verses.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحْىٌ يُوحَىٰ
verses.english: It is not but a revelation revealed,

verses.arabic: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلْقُوَىٰ
verses.english: Taught to him by one intense in strength -

verses.arabic: ذُو مِرَّةٍ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ
verses.english: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form

verses.arabic: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ
verses.english: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.

verses.arabic: فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ مَآ أَوْحَىٰ
verses.english: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed.

verses.arabic: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.english: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.

verses.arabic: أَفَتُمَـٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ
verses.english: So will you dispute with him over what he saw?

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.english: And he certainly saw him in another descent

verses.arabic: عِندَ سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.english: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -

verses.arabic: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ
verses.english: Near it is the Garden of Refuge -

verses.arabic: إِذْ يَغْشَى ٱلسِّدْرَةَ مَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.english: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].

verses.arabic: مَا زَاغَ ٱلْبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.english: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].

verses.arabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
verses.english: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلْعُزَّىٰ
verses.english: So have you considered al-Lat and al-\'Uzza?

verses.arabic: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ
verses.english: And Manat, the third - the other one?

verses.arabic: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.english: Is the male for you and for Him the female?

verses.arabic: تِلْكَ إِذًا قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.english: That, then, is an unjust division.

verses.arabic: أَمْ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.english: Or is there for man whatever he wishes?

verses.arabic: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.english: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].

verses.arabic: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.english: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allah has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.english: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,

verses.arabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
verses.english: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.

verses.arabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.english: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.english: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.english: Have you seen the one who turned away

verses.arabic: وَأَعْطَىٰ قَلِيلًا وَأَكْدَىٰٓ
verses.english: And gave a little and [then] refrained?

verses.arabic: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.english: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.english: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses

verses.arabic: وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِى وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.english: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -

verses.arabic: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.english: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another

verses.arabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.english: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ سَعْيَهُۥ سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.english: And that his effort is going to be seen -

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ يُجْزَىٰهُ ٱلْجَزَآءَ ٱلْأَوْفَىٰ
verses.english: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.english: And that to your Lord is the finality

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ
verses.english: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا
verses.english: And that it is He who causes death and gives life

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.english: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -

verses.arabic: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ
verses.english: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ
verses.english: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ
verses.english: And that it is He who enriches and suffices

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ
verses.english: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius

verses.arabic: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ
verses.english: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them] -

verses.arabic: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ
verses.english: And the overturned towns He hurled down

verses.arabic: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.english: And covered them by that which He covered.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.english: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?

verses.arabic: هَـٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.english: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners.

verses.arabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.english: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover.

verses.arabic: أَفَمِنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ
verses.english: Then at this statement do you wonder?

verses.arabic: وَأَنتُمْ سَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.english: While you are proudly sporting?

verses.arabic: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩
verses.english: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him].

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.english: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].

verses.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
verses.english: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
verses.english: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -

verses.arabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.english: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

verses.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
verses.english: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

verses.arabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
verses.english: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

verses.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.english: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

verses.arabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
verses.english: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

verses.arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.english: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

verses.arabic: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
verses.english: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

verses.arabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.english: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.english: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.english: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
verses.english: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.english: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.english: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

verses.arabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
verses.english: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

verses.arabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
verses.english: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

verses.arabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.english: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

verses.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
verses.english: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

verses.arabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.english: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.english: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.english: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.english: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
verses.english: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

verses.arabic: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.english: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.english: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.

verses.arabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.english: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

verses.arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
verses.english: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
verses.english: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.

verses.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.english: And everything they did is in written records.

verses.arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
verses.english: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
verses.english: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,

verses.arabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
verses.english: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.

verses.arabic: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ
verses.english: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,

verses.arabic: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ
verses.english: And the stars and trees prostrate.

verses.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.english: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance

verses.arabic: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ
verses.english: That you not transgress within the balance.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ
verses.english: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.

verses.arabic: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ
verses.english: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]

verses.arabic: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ
verses.english: And grain having husks and scented plants.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ
verses.english: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.

verses.arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
verses.english: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ
verses.english: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ
verses.english: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];

verses.arabic: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ
verses.english: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.english: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
verses.english: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍ
verses.english: Everyone upon the earth will perish,

verses.arabic: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.english: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
verses.english: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ
verses.english: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ
verses.english: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah].

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.english: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
verses.english: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.english: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.

verses.arabic: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ
verses.english: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.english: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ
verses.english: In both of them are two springs, flowing.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ
verses.english: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
verses.english: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.english: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.english: As if they were rubies and coral.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ
verses.english: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.english: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.english: In both of them are two springs, spouting.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَنَخْلٌ وَرُمَّانٌ
verses.english: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٰتٌ حِسَانٌ
verses.english: In them are good and beautiful women -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: حُورٌ مَّقْصُورَٰتٌ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ
verses.english: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.english: Untouched before them by man or jinni -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.english: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

verses.arabic: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
verses.english: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.

verses.arabic: خَافِضَةٌ رَّافِعَةٌ
verses.english: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].

verses.arabic: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّا
verses.english: When the earth is shaken with convulsion

verses.arabic: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّا
verses.english: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling

verses.arabic: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا ثَلَـٰثَةً
verses.english: And you become [of] three kinds:

verses.arabic: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ
verses.english: And the forerunners, the forerunners -

verses.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.english: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]

verses.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: A [large] company of the former peoples

verses.arabic: وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: And a few of the later peoples,

verses.arabic: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّوْضُونَةٍ
verses.english: On thrones woven [with ornament],

verses.arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.english: Reclining on them, facing each other.

verses.arabic: يَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ
verses.english: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal

verses.arabic: بِأَكْوَابٍ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍ
verses.english: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -

verses.arabic: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.english: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.

verses.arabic: وَحُورٌ عِينٌ
verses.english: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,

verses.arabic: كَأَمْثَـٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُؤِ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ
verses.english: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,

verses.arabic: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: As reward for what they used to do.

verses.arabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
verses.english: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -

verses.arabic: إِلَّا قِيلًا سَلَـٰمًا سَلَـٰمًا
verses.english: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."

verses.arabic: فِى سِدْرٍ مَّخْضُودٍ
verses.english: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed

verses.arabic: وَطَلْحٍ مَّنضُودٍ
verses.english: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]

verses.arabic: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ
verses.english: And fruit, abundant [and varied],

verses.arabic: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍ
verses.english: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,

verses.arabic: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءً
verses.english: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation

verses.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: A company of the former peoples

verses.arabic: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: And a company of the later peoples.

verses.arabic: فِى سَمُومٍ وَحَمِيمٍ
verses.english: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ
verses.english: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,

verses.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: And they used to persist in the great violation,

verses.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.english: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

verses.arabic: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
verses.english: And our forefathers [as well]?"

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples

verses.arabic: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.english: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,

verses.arabic: لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٍ مِّن زَقُّومٍ
verses.english: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum

verses.arabic: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.english: And filling with it your bellies

verses.arabic: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.english: And drinking on top of it from scalding water

verses.arabic: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ
verses.english: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.

verses.arabic: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ
verses.english: We have created you, so why do you not believe?

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ
verses.english: Have you seen that which you emit?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.english: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?

verses.arabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.english: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

verses.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.english: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ
verses.english: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ
verses.english: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?

verses.arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
verses.english: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,

verses.arabic: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ
verses.english: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;

verses.arabic: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.english: Rather, we have been deprived."

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ
verses.english: And have you seen the water that you drink?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
verses.english: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?

verses.arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.english: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ
verses.english: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
verses.english: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

verses.arabic: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَـٰهَا تَذْكِرَةً وَمَتَـٰعًا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ
verses.english: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

verses.arabic: ۞ فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَوَٰقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.english: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,

verses.arabic: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ
verses.english: None touch it except the purified.

verses.arabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabic: أَفَبِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ
verses.english: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent

verses.arabic: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?

verses.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ
verses.english: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat

verses.arabic: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.english: And you are at that time looking on -

verses.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.english: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -

verses.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ
verses.english: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,

verses.arabic: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.english: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,

verses.arabic: فَرَوْحٌ وَرَيْحَانٌ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍ
verses.english: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.english: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,

verses.arabic: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
verses.english: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.english: Indeed, this is the true certainty,

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.english: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.

verses.arabic: لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
verses.english: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.

verses.arabic: ءَامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.english: Believe in Allah and His Messenger and spend out of that in which He has made you successors. For those who have believed among you and spent, there will be a great reward.

verses.arabic: وَمَا لَكُمْ لَا تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ وَقَدْ أَخَذَ مِيثَـٰقَكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.english: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers?

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful.

verses.arabic: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يُقْرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا فَيُضَـٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.english: Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward?

verses.arabic: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.english: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَـٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.english: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward.

verses.arabic: سَابِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا كَعَرْضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أُعِدَّتْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord and a Garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth, prepared for those who believed in Allah and His messengers. That is the bounty of Allah which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.

verses.arabic: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ
verses.english: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.english: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.english: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

verses.arabic: لِّئَلَّا يَعْلَمَ أَهْلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَلَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ مِّن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَأَنَّ ٱلْفَضْلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: [This is] so that the People of the Scripture may know that they are not able [to obtain] anything from the bounty of Allah and that [all] bounty is in the hand of Allah; He gives it to whom He wills. And Allah is the possessor of great bounty.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا تَنَـٰجَيْتُمْ فَلَا تَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ لِيَحْزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نَـٰجَيْتُمُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَةً ۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ وَأَطْهَرُ ۚ فَإِن لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: O you who have believed, when you [wish to] privately consult the Messenger, present before your consultation a charity. That is better for you and purer. But if you find not [the means] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

verses.arabic: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.english: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْأَذَلِّينَ
verses.english: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled.

verses.arabic: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِىٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
verses.english: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: مَا قَطَعْتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوْ تَرَكْتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخْزِىَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.english: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَوْجَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَيْلٍ وَلَا رِكَابٍ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: And what Allah restored [of property] to His Messenger from them - you did not spur for it [in an expedition] any horses or camels, but Allah gives His messengers power over whom He wills, and Allah is over all things competent.

verses.arabic: لِلْفُقَرَآءِ ٱلْمُهَـٰجِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُخْرِجُوا۟ مِن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ وَأَمْوَٰلِهِمْ يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًا وَيَنصُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
verses.english: For the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties, seeking bounty from Allah and [His] approval and supporting Allah and His Messenger, [there is also a share]. Those are the truthful.

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَٰنِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِٱلْإِيمَـٰنِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِى قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: And [there is a share for] those who came after them, saying, "Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts [any] resentment toward those who have believed. Our Lord, indeed You are Kind and Merciful."

verses.arabic: لَئِنْ أُخْرِجُوا۟ لَا يَخْرُجُونَ مَعَهُمْ وَلَئِن قُوتِلُوا۟ لَا يَنصُرُونَهُمْ وَلَئِن نَّصَرُوهُمْ لَيُوَلُّنَّ ٱلْأَدْبَـٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يُنصَرُونَ
verses.english: If they are expelled, they will not leave with them, and if they are fought, they will not aid them. And [even] if they should aid them, they will surely turn their backs; then [thereafter] they will not be aided.

verses.arabic: لَا يُقَـٰتِلُونَكُمْ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِى قُرًى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوْ مِن وَرَآءِ جُدُرٍۭ ۚ بَأْسُهُم بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيدٌ ۚ تَحْسَبُهُمْ جَمِيعًا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ شَتَّىٰ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.english: They will not fight you all except within fortified cities or from behind walls. Their violence among themselves is severe. You think they are together, but their hearts are diverse. That is because they are a people who do not reason.

verses.arabic: فَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَتَهُمَآ أَنَّهُمَا فِى ٱلنَّارِ خَـٰلِدَيْنِ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: So the outcome for both of them is that they will be in the Fire, abiding eternally therein. And that is the recompense of the wrong-doers.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْتَنظُرْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do.

verses.arabic: وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.english: And be not like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves. Those are the defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabic: لَوْ أَنزَلْنَا هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍ لَّرَأَيْتَهُۥ خَـٰشِعًا مُّتَصَدِّعًا مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.english: If We had sent down this Qur\'an upon a mountain, you would have seen it humbled and coming apart from fear of Allah. And these examples We present to the people that perhaps they will give thought.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ۖ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.english: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed. He is the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ ٱلسَّلَـٰمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُ ٱلْمُهَيْمِنُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْجَبَّارُ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.english: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Perfection, the Bestower of Faith, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might, the Compeller, the Superior. Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُ ٱلْبَارِئُ ٱلْمُصَوِّرُ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor, the Fashioner; to Him belong the best names. Whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا۟ لَكُمْ أَعْدَآءً وَيَبْسُطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِٱلسُّوٓءِ وَوَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.english: If they gain dominance over you, they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil, and they wish you would disbelieve.

verses.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِيهِمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.english: There has certainly been for you in them an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.

verses.arabic: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةً ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: Perhaps Allah will put, between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them, affection. And Allah is competent, and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

verses.arabic: لَّا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقَـٰتِلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَلَمْ يُخْرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمْ وَتُقْسِطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ
verses.english: Allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes - from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ قَـٰتَلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَأَخْرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ وَظَـٰهَرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ إِخْرَاجِكُمْ أَن تَوَلَّوْهُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمْ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.english: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?

verses.arabic: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.english: Great is hatred in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَـٰنٌ مَّرْصُوصٌ
verses.english: Indeed, Allah loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.

verses.arabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلَـٰمِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُونَ
verses.english: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allah dislike it.

verses.arabic: تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجَـٰهِدُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know.

verses.arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ وَمَسَـٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِى جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.english: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.

verses.arabic: وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا ۖ نَصْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌ قَرِيبٌ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.english: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allah and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى بَعَثَ فِى ٱلْأُمِّيِّـۧنَ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ وَيُزَكِّيهِمْ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَإِن كَانُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.english: It is He who has sent among the unlettered a Messenger from themselves reciting to them His verses and purifying them and teaching them the Book and wisdom - although they were before in clear error -

verses.arabic: وَءَاخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا۟ بِهِمْ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: And [to] others of them who have not yet joined them. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: That is the bounty of Allah, which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.

verses.arabic: مَثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ حُمِّلُوا۟ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَحْمِلُوهَا كَمَثَلِ ٱلْحِمَارِ يَحْمِلُ أَسْفَارًۢا ۚ بِئْسَ مَثَلُ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: The example of those who were entrusted with the Torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey who carries volumes [of books]. Wretched is the example of the people who deny the signs of Allah. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.

verses.arabic: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوٓا۟ إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful."

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوْنَهُۥٓ أَبَدًۢا بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: But they will not wish for it, ever, because of what their hands have put forth. And Allah is Knowing of the wrongdoers.

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْمَوْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَفِرُّونَ مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ مُلَـٰقِيكُمْ ۖ ثُمَّ تُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: Say, "Indeed, the death from which you flee - indeed, it will meet you. Then you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you about what you used to do."

verses.arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ تِجَـٰرَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا ٱنفَضُّوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَآئِمًا ۚ قُلْ مَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ ٱلتِّجَـٰرَةِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
verses.english: But when they saw a transaction or a diversion, [O Muhammad], they rushed to it and left you standing. Say, "What is with Allah is better than diversion and than a transaction, and Allah is the best of providers."

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا۟ فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.english: That is because they believed, and then they disbelieved; so their hearts were sealed over, and they do not understand.

verses.arabic: سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَسْتَغْفَرْتَ لَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ لَن يَغْفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.english: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them; never will Allah forgive them. Indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of Allah. And whoever does that - then those are the losers.

verses.arabic: وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: But never will Allah delay a soul when its time has come. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs [all] praise, and He is over all things competent.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.english: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.

verses.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَوَّرَكُمْ فَأَحْسَنَ صُوَرَكُمْ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.english: He created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms; and to Him is the [final] destination.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُۥ كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرٌ يَهْدُونَنَا فَكَفَرُوا۟ وَتَوَلَّوا۟ ۚ وَّٱسْتَغْنَى ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌ
verses.english: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.

verses.arabic: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ ۚ فَإِن تَوَلَّيْتُمْ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَىٰ رَسُولِنَا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.english: And obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon Our Messenger is only [the duty of] clear notification.

verses.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.english: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward.

verses.arabic: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ وَٱسْمَعُوا۟ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّأَنفُسِكُمْ ۗ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.english: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful.

verses.arabic: إِن تُقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعِفْهُ لَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ شَكُورٌ حَلِيمٌ
verses.english: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. And Allah is Most Appreciative and Forbearing.

verses.arabic: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَـٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدْرًا
verses.english: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him. Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose. Allah has already set for everything a [decreed] extent.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ أَنزَلَهُۥٓ إِلَيْكُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُعْظِمْ لَهُۥٓ أَجْرًا
verses.english: That is the command of Allah, which He has sent down to you; and whoever fears Allah - He will remove for him his misdeeds and make great for him his reward.

verses.arabic: لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍ مِّن سَعَتِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُۥ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَآ ءَاتَىٰهَا ۚ سَيَجْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
verses.english: Let a man of wealth spend from his wealth, and he whose provision is restricted - let him spend from what Allah has given him. Allah does not charge a soul except [according to] what He has given it. Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease.

verses.arabic: فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا
verses.english: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss.

verses.arabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ وَمِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ مِثْلَهُنَّ يَتَنَزَّلُ ٱلْأَمْرُ بَيْنَهُنَّ لِتَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًۢا
verses.english: It is Allah who has created seven heavens and of the earth, the like of them. [His] command descends among them so you may know that Allah is over all things competent and that Allah has encompassed all things in knowledge.

verses.arabic: إِن تَتُوبَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا ۖ وَإِن تَظَـٰهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَـٰلِحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۖ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ
verses.english: If you two [wives] repent to Allah, [it is best], for your hearts have deviated. But if you cooperate against him - then indeed Allah is his protector, and Gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels, moreover, are [his] assistants.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: O you who have disbelieved, make no excuses that Day. You will only be recompensed for what you used to do.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ
verses.english: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا ۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِن تَفَـٰوُتٍ ۖ فَٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍ
verses.english: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks?

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌ
verses.english: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.

verses.arabic: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
verses.english: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.

verses.arabic: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ
verses.english: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner?"

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٌ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ كَبِيرٍ
verses.english: They will say," Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, \'Allah has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error.\'"

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.english: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.

verses.arabic: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.english: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.english: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.

verses.arabic: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَمُورُ
verses.english: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway?

verses.arabic: أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ
verses.english: Or do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.english: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.

verses.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَـٰٓفَّـٰتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.english: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.

verses.arabic: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.english: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.

verses.arabic: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
verses.english: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?

verses.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.english: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful."

verses.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.english: Say, "It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered."

verses.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."

verses.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.english: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error."

verses.arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.english: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?"

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ
verses.english: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe,

verses.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.english: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.english: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.english: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.

verses.arabic: فَسَتُبْصِرُ وَيُبْصِرُونَ
verses.english: So you will see and they will see

verses.arabic: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ
verses.english: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].

verses.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
verses.english: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.

verses.arabic: وَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ
verses.english: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].

verses.arabic: وَلَا تُطِعْ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.english: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer

verses.arabic: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيمٍ
verses.english: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -

verses.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.english: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful,

verses.arabic: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ
verses.english: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.

verses.arabic: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.english: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,

verses.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."

verses.arabic: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْخُرْطُومِ
verses.english: We will brand him upon the snout.

verses.arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.english: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.

verses.arabic: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
verses.english: And it became as though reaped.

verses.arabic: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.english: And they called one another at morning,

verses.arabic: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ
verses.english: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."

verses.arabic: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ
verses.english: So they set out, while lowering their voices,

verses.arabic: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ
verses.english: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.

verses.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.english: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;

verses.arabic: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.english: Rather, we have been deprived."

verses.arabic: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.english: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, \'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?\' "

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.english: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.

verses.arabic: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
verses.english: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."

verses.arabic: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.english: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.

verses.arabic: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.english: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَـٰبٌ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ
verses.english: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn

verses.arabic: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.english: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?

verses.arabic: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
verses.english: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.

verses.arabic: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ
verses.english: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.

verses.arabic: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ
verses.english: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.

verses.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.english: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

verses.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.english: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

verses.arabic: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.english: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.

verses.arabic: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.english: What is the Inevitable Reality?

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?

verses.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
verses.english: Thamud and \'Aad denied the Striking Calamity.

verses.arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
verses.english: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

verses.arabic: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
verses.english: Then do you see of them any remains?

verses.arabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
verses.english: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

verses.arabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
verses.english: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship

verses.arabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
verses.english: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

verses.arabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
verses.english: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -

verses.arabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.english: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur,

verses.arabic: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ
verses.english: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
verses.english: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.english: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

verses.arabic: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.english: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

verses.arabic: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.english: So he will be in a pleasant life -

verses.arabic: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
verses.english: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

verses.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
verses.english: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.english: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

verses.arabic: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.english: And had not known what is my account.

verses.arabic: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
verses.english: I wish my death had been the decisive one.

verses.arabic: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ
verses.english: Gone from me is my authority."

verses.arabic: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.english: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
verses.english: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.english: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

verses.arabic: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ
verses.english: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend

verses.arabic: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَـٰطِـُٔونَ
verses.english: None will eat it except the sinners.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.english: [That] indeed, the Qur\'an is the word of a noble Messenger.

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

verses.arabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.english: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.

verses.arabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabic: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.english: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings,

verses.arabic: لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.english: We would have seized him by the right hand;

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعْنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْوَتِينَ
verses.english: Then We would have cut from him the aorta.

verses.arabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
verses.english: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.english: And indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder for the righteous.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.english: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

verses.arabic: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ
verses.english: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent.

verses.arabic: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
verses.english: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.

verses.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.english: So be patient with gracious patience.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُۥ بَعِيدًا
verses.english: Indeed, they see it [as] distant,

verses.arabic: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ
verses.english: And the mountains will be like wool,

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَسْـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمًا
verses.english: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,

verses.arabic: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِى تُـْٔوِيهِ
verses.english: And his nearest kindred who shelter him

verses.arabic: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
verses.english: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
verses.english: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],

verses.arabic: تَدْعُوا۟ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.english: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]

verses.arabic: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوْعَىٰٓ
verses.english: And collected [wealth] and hoarded.

verses.arabic: ۞ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا
verses.english: Indeed, mankind was created anxious:

verses.arabic: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا
verses.english: When evil touches him, impatient,

verses.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.english: Except the observers of prayer -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ
verses.english: Those who are constant in their prayer

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.english: And those within whose wealth is a known right

verses.arabic: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.english: For the petitioner and the deprived -

verses.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
verses.english: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ
verses.english: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَـٰدَٰتِهِمْ قَآئِمُونَ
verses.english: And those who are in their testimonies upright

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
verses.english: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:

verses.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ مُّكْرَمُونَ
verses.english: They will be in gardens, honored.

verses.arabic: عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ
verses.english: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?

verses.arabic: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
verses.english: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.

verses.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
verses.english: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able

verses.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.english: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.

verses.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.english: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -

verses.arabic: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
verses.english: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.

verses.arabic: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.english: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
