verses.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,

verses.arabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.english: [Saying], \'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.

verses.arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.\' "

verses.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
verses.english: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

verses.arabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
verses.english: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.

verses.arabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَـٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
verses.english: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
verses.english: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly

verses.arabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
verses.english: And said, \'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

verses.arabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَـٰرًا
verses.english: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.

verses.arabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
verses.english: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur

verses.arabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
verses.english: While He has created you in stages?

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
verses.english: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
verses.english: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?

verses.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
verses.english: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
verses.english: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.

verses.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
verses.english: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse

verses.arabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
verses.english: That you may follow therein roads of passage.\' "

verses.arabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
verses.english: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.

verses.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
verses.english: And said, \'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa\' or Yaghuth and Ya\'uq and Nasr.

verses.arabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلًا
verses.english: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

verses.arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
verses.english: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.

verses.arabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
verses.english: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

verses.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
verses.english: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًا
verses.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, \'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur\'an.

verses.arabic: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا
verses.english: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًا
verses.english: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا
verses.english: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا
verses.english: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًا
verses.english: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger].

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَـٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا
verses.english: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَـٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْـَٔانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
verses.english: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
verses.english: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًا
verses.english: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
verses.english: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
verses.english: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
verses.english: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.\'

verses.arabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَـٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
verses.english: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَـٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
verses.english: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone.

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
verses.english: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا
verses.english: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
verses.english: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.

verses.arabic: إِلَّا بَلَـٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَـٰلَـٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
verses.english: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا
verses.english: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."

verses.arabic: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.english: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone

verses.arabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًا
verses.english: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before each messenger and behind him observers

verses.arabic: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا
verses.english: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ
verses.english: O you who wraps himself [in clothing],

verses.arabic: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
verses.english: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -

verses.arabic: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
verses.english: Half of it - or subtract from it a little

verses.arabic: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
verses.english: Or add to it, and recite the Qur\'an with measured recitation.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
verses.english: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
verses.english: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.

verses.arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
verses.english: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

verses.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
verses.english: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

verses.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.english: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

verses.arabic: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
verses.english: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
verses.english: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire

verses.arabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا
verses.english: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired?

verses.arabic: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
verses.english: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.english: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ
verses.english: O you who covers himself [with a garment],

verses.arabic: وَلَا تَمْنُن تَسْتَكْثِرُ
verses.english: And do not confer favor to acquire more

verses.arabic: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَوْمٌ عَسِيرٌ
verses.english: That Day will be a difficult day

verses.arabic: ذَرْنِى وَمَنْ خَلَقْتُ وَحِيدًا
verses.english: Leave Me with the one I created alone

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلْتُ لَهُۥ مَالًا مَّمْدُودًا
verses.english: And to whom I granted extensive wealth

verses.arabic: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودًا
verses.english: And children present [with him]

verses.arabic: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمْهِيدًا
verses.english: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life].

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ يَطْمَعُ أَنْ أَزِيدَ
verses.english: Then he desires that I should add more.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا عَنِيدًا
verses.english: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate.

verses.arabic: سَأُرْهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا
verses.english: I will cover him with arduous torment.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ
verses.english: Indeed, he thought and deliberated.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ
verses.english: Then he turned back and was arrogant

verses.arabic: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ
verses.english: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others].

verses.arabic: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوْلُ ٱلْبَشَرِ
verses.english: This is not but the word of a human being."

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is Saqar?

verses.arabic: لَا تُبْقِى وَلَا تَذَرُ
verses.english: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned],

verses.arabic: عَلَيْهَا تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ
verses.english: Over it are nineteen [angels].

verses.arabic: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَآ أَسْفَرَ
verses.english: And [by] the morning when it brightens,

verses.arabic: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ
verses.english: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]

verses.arabic: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
verses.english: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind.

verses.arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ
verses.english: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained

verses.arabic: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.english: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other

verses.arabic: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِى سَقَرَ
verses.english: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar?"

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.english: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed,

verses.arabic: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ
verses.english: Nor did we used to feed the poor.

verses.arabic: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلْخَآئِضِينَ
verses.english: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],

verses.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلْيَقِينُ
verses.english: Until there came to us the certainty."

verses.arabic: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ شَفَـٰعَةُ ٱلشَّـٰفِعِينَ
verses.english: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors.

verses.arabic: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.english: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away

verses.arabic: كَأَنَّهُمْ حُمُرٌ مُّسْتَنفِرَةٌ
verses.english: As if they were alarmed donkeys

verses.arabic: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً
verses.english: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about.

verses.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
verses.english: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌ
verses.english: No! Indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder

verses.arabic: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.english: Then whoever wills will remember it.

verses.arabic: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
verses.english: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness.

verses.arabic: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ
verses.english: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].

verses.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ
verses.english: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?

verses.arabic: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
verses.english: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.

verses.arabic: بَلْ يُرِيدُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ لِيَفْجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ
verses.english: But man desires to continue in sin.

verses.arabic: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.english: And the sun and the moon are joined,

verses.arabic: يَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ أَيْنَ ٱلْمَفَرُّ
verses.english: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"

verses.arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ
verses.english: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.

verses.arabic: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
verses.english: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.

verses.arabic: بَلِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٌ
verses.english: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,

verses.arabic: وَلَوْ أَلْقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ
verses.english: Even if he presents his excuses.

verses.arabic: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
verses.english: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur\'an.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ
verses.english: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ
verses.english: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].

verses.arabic: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ
verses.english: No! But you love the immediate

verses.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاضِرَةٌ
verses.english: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,

verses.arabic: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَاسِرَةٌ
verses.english: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,

verses.arabic: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفْعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌ
verses.english: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِىَ
verses.english: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones

verses.arabic: وَقِيلَ مَنْ ۜ رَاقٍ
verses.english: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"

verses.arabic: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلْفِرَاقُ
verses.english: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation

verses.arabic: وَٱلْتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ
verses.english: And the leg is wound about the leg,

verses.arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ
verses.english: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.

verses.arabic: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
verses.english: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ
verses.english: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].

verses.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى
verses.english: Does man think that he will be left neglected?

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.english: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]

verses.arabic: فَجَعَلَ مِنْهُ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.english: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.

verses.arabic: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
verses.english: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
verses.english: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

verses.arabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
verses.english: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
verses.english: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur,

verses.arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
verses.english: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

verses.arabic: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
verses.english: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.english: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

verses.arabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
verses.english: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

verses.arabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
verses.english: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

verses.arabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
verses.english: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

verses.arabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
verses.english: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

verses.arabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
verses.english: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

verses.arabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
verses.english: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

verses.arabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
verses.english: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

verses.arabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
verses.english: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.

verses.arabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
verses.english: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

verses.arabic: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
verses.english: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
verses.english: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

verses.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
verses.english: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur\'an progressively.

verses.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
verses.english: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

verses.arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
verses.english: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

verses.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
verses.english: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.english: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

verses.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
verses.english: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلْمُرْسَلَـٰتِ عُرْفًا
verses.english: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts

verses.arabic: فَٱلْعَـٰصِفَـٰتِ عَصْفًا
verses.english: And the winds that blow violently

verses.arabic: وَٱلنَّـٰشِرَٰتِ نَشْرًا
verses.english: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]

verses.arabic: فَٱلْفَـٰرِقَـٰتِ فَرْقًا
verses.english: And those [angels] who bring criterion

verses.arabic: فَٱلْمُلْقِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا
verses.english: And those [angels] who deliver a message

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.english: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.

verses.arabic: لِأَىِّ يَوْمٍ أُجِّلَتْ
verses.english: For what Day was it postponed?

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ نُتْبِعُهُمُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: Then We will follow them with the later ones.

verses.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.english: Thus do We deal with the criminals.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ نَخْلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.english: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?

verses.arabic: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
verses.english: And We placed it in a firm lodging

verses.arabic: فَقَدَرْنَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْقَـٰدِرُونَ
verses.english: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ كِفَاتًا
verses.english: Have We not made the earth a container

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ شَـٰمِخَـٰتٍ وَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُم مَّآءً فُرَاتًا
verses.english: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.

verses.arabic: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّ ذِى ثَلَـٰثِ شُعَبٍ
verses.english: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns

verses.arabic: لَّا ظَلِيلٍ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
verses.english: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."

verses.arabic: إِنَّهَا تَرْمِى بِشَرَرٍ كَٱلْقَصْرِ
verses.english: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,

verses.arabic: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَـٰلَتٌ صُفْرٌ
verses.english: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.english: This is a Day they will not speak,

verses.arabic: وَلَا يُؤْذَنُ لَهُمْ فَيَعْتَذِرُونَ
verses.english: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمْ كَيْدٌ فَكِيدُونِ
verses.english: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.english: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs

verses.arabic: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.english: And fruits from whatever they desire,

verses.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

verses.arabic: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.english: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: Then in what statement after the Qur\'an will they believe?

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.english: About what are they asking one another?

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.english: That over which they are in disagreement.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: Then, no! They are going to know.

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِهَـٰدًا
verses.english: Have We not made the earth a resting place?

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًا
verses.english: And made your sleep [a means for] rest

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا
verses.english: And made the night as clothing

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًا
verses.english: And made the day for livelihood

verses.arabic: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًا شِدَادًا
verses.english: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا
verses.english: And made [therein] a burning lamp

verses.arabic: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا
verses.english: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water

verses.arabic: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا
verses.english: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation

verses.arabic: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا
verses.english: And gardens of entwined growth.

verses.arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.english: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes

verses.arabic: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٰبًا
verses.english: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways

verses.arabic: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا
verses.english: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا
verses.english: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait

verses.arabic: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔابًا
verses.english: For the transgressors, a place of return,

verses.arabic: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًا
verses.english: In which they will remain for ages [unending].

verses.arabic: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
verses.english: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink

verses.arabic: إِلَّا حَمِيمًا وَغَسَّاقًا
verses.english: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًا
verses.english: Indeed, they were not expecting an account

verses.arabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كِذَّابًا
verses.english: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.

verses.arabic: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ كِتَـٰبًا
verses.english: But all things We have enumerated in writing.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا
verses.english: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -

verses.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا
verses.english: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -

verses.arabic: جَزَآءً مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًا
verses.english: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,

verses.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
verses.english: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.

verses.arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
verses.english: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
verses.english: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا
verses.english: By those [angels] who extract with violence

verses.arabic: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَـٰتِ نَشْطًا
verses.english: And [by] those who remove with ease

verses.arabic: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَـٰتِ سَبْحًا
verses.english: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming

verses.arabic: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَـٰتِ سَبْقًا
verses.english: And those who race each other in a race

verses.arabic: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.english: And those who arrange [each] matter,

verses.arabic: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ
verses.english: There will follow it the subsequent [one].

verses.arabic: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ
verses.english: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,

verses.arabic: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ
verses.english: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?

verses.arabic: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا نَّخِرَةً
verses.english: Even if we should be decayed bones?

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌ
verses.english: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."

verses.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
verses.english: Indeed, it will be but one shout,

verses.arabic: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ
verses.english: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth\'s surface.

verses.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
verses.english: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,

verses.arabic: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.english: And say to him, \'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself

verses.arabic: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ
verses.english: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?\'"

verses.arabic: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلْـَٔايَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.english: And he showed him the greatest sign,

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ
verses.english: Then he turned his back, striving.

verses.arabic: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ
verses.english: And he gathered [his people] and called out

verses.arabic: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.english: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."

verses.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
verses.english: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
verses.english: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.

verses.arabic: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.english: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.

verses.arabic: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.english: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ
verses.english: And after that He spread the earth.

verses.arabic: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا
verses.english: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,

verses.arabic: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَىٰهَا
verses.english: And the mountains He set firmly

verses.arabic: مَتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
verses.english: As provision for you and your grazing livestock.

verses.arabic: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.english: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -

verses.arabic: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ
verses.english: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -

verses.arabic: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.english: And preferred the life of the world,

verses.arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
verses.english: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.

verses.arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
verses.english: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.

verses.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا
verses.english: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?

verses.arabic: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَىٰهَآ
verses.english: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰهَا
verses.english: You are only a warner for those who fear it.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.english: The Prophet frowned and turned away

verses.arabic: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ
verses.english: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].

verses.arabic: وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ
verses.english: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified

verses.arabic: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ
verses.english: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?

verses.arabic: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
verses.english: As for he who thinks himself without need,

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسْعَىٰ
verses.english: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ
verses.english: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;

verses.arabic: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.english: So whoever wills may remember it.

verses.arabic: فِى صُحُفٍ مُّكَرَّمَةٍ
verses.english: [It is recorded] in honored sheets,

verses.arabic: بِأَيْدِى سَفَرَةٍ
verses.english: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels,

verses.arabic: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ
verses.english: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.

verses.arabic: مِنْ أَىِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ
verses.english: From what substance did He create him?

verses.arabic: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ
verses.english: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ
verses.english: Then He eased the way for him;

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقْبَرَهُۥ
verses.english: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.

verses.arabic: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ
verses.english: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.

verses.arabic: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ
verses.english: Then let mankind look at his food -

verses.arabic: أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا ٱلْمَآءَ صَبًّا
verses.english: How We poured down water in torrents,

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ شَقَقْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ شَقًّا
verses.english: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],

verses.arabic: فَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا حَبًّا
verses.english: And caused to grow within it grain

verses.arabic: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلْبًا
verses.english: And gardens of dense shrubbery

verses.arabic: مَّتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
verses.english: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.

verses.arabic: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ
verses.english: But when there comes the Deafening Blast

verses.arabic: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ
verses.english: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.

verses.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ مُّسْفِرَةٌ
verses.english: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -

verses.arabic: ضَاحِكَةٌ مُّسْتَبْشِرَةٌ
verses.english: Laughing, rejoicing at good news.

verses.arabic: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ
verses.english: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ
verses.english: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]

verses.arabic: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ
verses.english: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

verses.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ
verses.english: So I swear by the retreating stars -

verses.arabic: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ
verses.english: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ
verses.english: And by the night as it closes in

verses.arabic: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ
verses.english: And by the dawn when it breathes

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.english: [That] indeed, the Qur\'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger

verses.arabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
verses.english: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],

verses.arabic: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍ
verses.english: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.

verses.arabic: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.english: And your companion is not [at all] mad.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.english: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍ
verses.english: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
verses.english: And the Qur\'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].

verses.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: It is not except a reminder to the worlds

verses.arabic: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ
verses.english: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.

verses.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.

verses.arabic: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ وَأَخَّرَتْ
verses.english: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
verses.english: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ
verses.english: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?

verses.arabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
verses.english: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.

verses.arabic: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.english: No! But you deny the Recompense.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ لَحَـٰفِظِينَ
verses.english: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
verses.english: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍ
verses.english: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُمْ عَنْهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ
verses.english: And never therefrom will they be absent.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ
verses.english: Woe to those who give less [than due],

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
verses.english: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.

verses.arabic: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ
verses.english: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.

verses.arabic: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ
verses.english: Do they not think that they will be resurrected

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
verses.english: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?

verses.arabic: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
verses.english: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.

verses.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,

verses.arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.english: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.

verses.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."

verses.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.english: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
verses.english: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.english: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
verses.english: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in \'illiyyun.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is \'illiyyun?

verses.arabic: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
verses.english: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed

verses.arabic: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.english: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
verses.english: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure

verses.arabic: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.english: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.

verses.arabic: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍ مَّخْتُومٍ
verses.english: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.

verses.arabic: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
verses.english: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.

verses.arabic: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ
verses.english: And its mixture is of Tasneem,

verses.arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.english: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.english: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ
verses.english: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.

verses.arabic: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
verses.english: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]

verses.arabic: وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ
verses.english: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]

verses.arabic: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
verses.english: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
verses.english: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ
verses.english: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,

verses.arabic: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
verses.english: And return to his people in happiness.

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
verses.english: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,

verses.arabic: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا
verses.english: He will cry out for destruction

verses.arabic: وَيَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا
verses.english: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
verses.english: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
verses.english: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].

verses.arabic: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
verses.english: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.

verses.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ
verses.english: So I swear by the twilight glow

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ
verses.english: And [by] the night and what it envelops

verses.arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ
verses.english: And [by] the moon when it becomes full

verses.arabic: لَتَرْكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٍ
verses.english: [That] you will surely experience state after state.

verses.arabic: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,

verses.arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: But those who have disbelieved deny,

verses.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ
verses.english: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.

verses.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
verses.english: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ
verses.english: By the sky containing great stars

verses.arabic: وَشَاهِدٍ وَمَشْهُودٍ
verses.english: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,

verses.arabic: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ
verses.english: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,

verses.arabic: إِذْ هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌ
verses.english: When they were sitting near it

verses.arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
verses.english: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
verses.english: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
verses.english: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.english: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبْدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ
verses.english: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.

verses.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلْوَدُودُ
verses.english: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,

verses.arabic: ذُو ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْمَجِيدُ
verses.english: Honorable Owner of the Throne,

verses.arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍ
verses.english: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,

verses.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ
verses.english: While Allah encompasses them from behind.

verses.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْءَانٌ مَّجِيدٌ
verses.english: But this is an honored Qur\'an

verses.arabic: فِى لَوْحٍ مَّحْفُوظٍۭ
verses.english: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ
verses.english: By the sky and the night comer -

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is the night comer?

verses.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
verses.english: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.

verses.arabic: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ
verses.english: So let man observe from what he was created.

verses.arabic: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٍ دَافِقٍ
verses.english: He was created from a fluid, ejected,

verses.arabic: يَخْرُجُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ ٱلصُّلْبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ
verses.english: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌ
verses.english: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.

verses.arabic: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ
verses.english: Then man will have no power or any helper.

verses.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجْعِ
verses.english: By the sky which returns [rain]

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدْعِ
verses.english: And [by] the earth which cracks open,

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلٌ فَصْلٌ
verses.english: Indeed, the Qur\'an is a decisive statement,

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا
verses.english: Indeed, they are planning a plan,

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى
verses.english: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
verses.english: And who destined and [then] guided

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلْمَرْعَىٰ
verses.english: And who brings out the pasture

verses.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحْوَىٰ
verses.english: And [then] makes it black stubble.

verses.arabic: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
verses.english: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,

verses.arabic: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
verses.english: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.

verses.arabic: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
verses.english: And We will ease you toward ease.

verses.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
verses.english: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;

verses.arabic: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ
verses.english: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.

verses.arabic: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَشْقَى
verses.english: But the wretched one will avoid it -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.english: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
verses.english: Neither dying therein nor living.

verses.arabic: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.english: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself

verses.arabic: وَذَكَرَ ٱسْمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ
verses.english: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.

verses.arabic: بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.english: But you prefer the worldly life,

verses.arabic: وَٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
verses.english: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَفِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.english: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,

verses.arabic: صُحُفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ
verses.english: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْغَـٰشِيَةِ
verses.english: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?

verses.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَـٰشِعَةٌ
verses.english: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,

verses.arabic: تَصْلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةً
verses.english: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.

verses.arabic: تُسْقَىٰ مِنْ عَيْنٍ ءَانِيَةٍ
verses.english: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.

verses.arabic: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ
verses.english: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant

verses.arabic: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍ
verses.english: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.

verses.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاعِمَةٌ
verses.english: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.

verses.arabic: لِّسَعْيِهَا رَاضِيَةٌ
verses.english: With their effort [they are] satisfied

verses.arabic: لَّا تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا لَـٰغِيَةً
verses.english: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.

verses.arabic: فِيهَا عَيْنٌ جَارِيَةٌ
verses.english: Within it is a flowing spring.

verses.arabic: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
verses.english: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?

verses.arabic: وَإِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيْفَ رُفِعَتْ
verses.english: And at the sky - how it is raised?

verses.arabic: وَإِلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ كَيْفَ نُصِبَتْ
verses.english: And at the mountains - how they are erected?

verses.arabic: وَإِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَيْفَ سُطِحَتْ
verses.english: And at the earth - how it is spread out?

verses.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٌ
verses.english: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.

verses.arabic: لَّسْتَ عَلَيْهِم بِمُصَيْطِرٍ
verses.english: You are not over them a controller.

verses.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ
verses.english: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -

verses.arabic: إِنَّ إِلَيْنَآ إِيَابَهُمْ
verses.english: Indeed, to Us is their return.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا حِسَابَهُم
verses.english: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.

verses.arabic: وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ
verses.english: And [by] the even [number] and the odd

verses.arabic: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ
verses.english: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,

verses.arabic: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
verses.english: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?

verses.arabic: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُوا۟ ٱلصَّخْرَ بِٱلْوَادِ
verses.english: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
verses.english: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands

verses.arabic: فَأَكْثَرُوا۟ فِيهَا ٱلْفَسَادَ
verses.english: And increased therein the corruption.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ
verses.english: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
verses.english: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
verses.english: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."

verses.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
verses.english: No! But you do not honor the orphan

verses.arabic: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.english: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.

verses.arabic: وَتَأْكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكْلًا لَّمًّا
verses.english: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,

verses.arabic: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلْمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّا
verses.english: And you love wealth with immense love.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
verses.english: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -

verses.arabic: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا
verses.english: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,

verses.arabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
verses.english: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?

verses.arabic: يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى قَدَّمْتُ لِحَيَاتِى
verses.english: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."

verses.arabic: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.english: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ
verses.english: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,

verses.arabic: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً
verses.english: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],

verses.arabic: فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَـٰدِى
verses.english: And enter among My [righteous] servants

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.english: I swear by this city, Makkah -

verses.arabic: وَأَنتَ حِلٌّۢ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.english: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -

verses.arabic: وَوَالِدٍ وَمَا وَلَدَ
verses.english: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],

verses.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِى كَبَدٍ
verses.english: We have certainly created man into hardship.

verses.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ
verses.english: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?

verses.arabic: يَقُولُ أَهْلَكْتُ مَالًا لُّبَدًا
verses.english: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."

verses.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّمْ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.english: Does he think that no one has seen him?

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عَيْنَيْنِ
verses.english: Have We not made for him two eyes?

verses.arabic: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلنَّجْدَيْنِ
verses.english: And have shown him the two ways?

verses.arabic: فَلَا ٱقْتَحَمَ ٱلْعَقَبَةَ
verses.english: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْعَقَبَةُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?

verses.arabic: أَوْ إِطْعَـٰمٌ فِى يَوْمٍ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍ
verses.english: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger

verses.arabic: يَتِيمًا ذَا مَقْرَبَةٍ
verses.english: An orphan of near relationship

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
verses.english: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.

verses.arabic: عَلَيْهِمْ نَارٌ مُّؤْصَدَةٌۢ
verses.english: Over them will be fire closed in.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا
verses.english: And [by] the moon when it follows it

verses.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنَىٰهَا
verses.english: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَىٰهَا
verses.english: And [by] the earth and He who spread it

verses.arabic: وَنَفْسٍ وَمَا سَوَّىٰهَا
verses.english: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it

verses.arabic: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَىٰهَا
verses.english: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,

verses.arabic: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا
verses.english: He has succeeded who purifies it,

verses.arabic: وَقَدْ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا
verses.english: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].

verses.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِطَغْوَىٰهَآ
verses.english: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,

verses.arabic: إِذِ ٱنۢبَعَثَ أَشْقَىٰهَا
verses.english: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقْبَـٰهَا
verses.english: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.

verses.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.english: And [by] He who created the male and female,

verses.arabic: إِنَّ سَعْيَكُمْ لَشَتَّىٰ
verses.english: Indeed, your efforts are diverse.

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ
verses.english: As for he who gives and fears Allah

verses.arabic: وَصَدَّقَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
verses.english: And believes in the best [reward],

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۢ بَخِلَ وَٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
verses.english: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need

verses.arabic: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْعُسْرَىٰ
verses.english: We will ease him toward difficulty.

verses.arabic: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
verses.english: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?

verses.arabic: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا لَلْهُدَىٰ
verses.english: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَنَا لَلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.english: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].

verses.arabic: فَأَنذَرْتُكُمْ نَارًا تَلَظَّىٰ
verses.english: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.

verses.arabic: لَا يَصْلَىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلْأَشْقَى
verses.english: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.english: Who had denied and turned away.

verses.arabic: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَتْقَى
verses.english: But the righteous one will avoid it -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى يُؤْتِى مَالَهُۥ يَتَزَكَّىٰ
verses.english: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself

verses.arabic: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍ تُجْزَىٰٓ
verses.english: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded

verses.arabic: إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ وَجْهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.english: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.

verses.arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَىٰ
verses.english: And he is going to be satisfied.

verses.arabic: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
verses.english: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].

verses.arabic: وَلَلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.english: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].

verses.arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.english: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ يَجِدْكَ يَتِيمًا فَـَٔاوَىٰ
verses.english: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?

verses.arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدَىٰ
verses.english: And He found you lost and guided [you],

verses.arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ
verses.english: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقْهَرْ
verses.english: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلسَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنْهَرْ
verses.english: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثْ
verses.english: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].

verses.arabic: وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ
verses.english: And We removed from you your burden

verses.arabic: وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ
verses.english: And raised high for you your repute.

verses.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.english: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.english: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.

verses.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب
verses.english: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.

verses.arabic: وَهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ ٱلْأَمِينِ
verses.english: And [by] this secure city [Makkah],

verses.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
verses.english: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَـٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَـٰفِلِينَ
verses.english: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,

verses.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.english: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.

verses.arabic: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعْدُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.english: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ
verses.english: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -

verses.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ
verses.english: Created man from a clinging substance.

verses.arabic: ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ
verses.english: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -

verses.arabic: عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ
verses.english: Taught man that which he knew not.

verses.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَيَطْغَىٰٓ
verses.english: No! [But] indeed, man transgresses

verses.arabic: أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰٓ
verses.english: Because he sees himself self-sufficient.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ
verses.english: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.

verses.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ
verses.english: Have you seen the one who forbids

verses.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.english: Have you seen if he is upon guidance

verses.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.english: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ
verses.english: Does he not know that Allah sees?

verses.arabic: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
verses.english: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -

verses.arabic: فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُۥ
verses.english: Then let him call his associates;

verses.arabic: سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ
verses.english: We will call the angels of Hell.

verses.arabic: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩
verses.english: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

verses.arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
verses.english: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

verses.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
verses.english: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

verses.arabic: سَلَـٰمٌ هِىَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ ٱلْفَجْرِ
verses.english: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.

verses.arabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
verses.english: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures

verses.arabic: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ
verses.english: Within which are correct writings.

verses.arabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
verses.english: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
verses.english: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
verses.english: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

verses.arabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
verses.english: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
verses.english: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake

verses.arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا لَهَا
verses.english: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -

verses.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
verses.english: That Day, it will report its news

verses.arabic: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
verses.english: Because your Lord has commanded it.

verses.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
verses.english: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

verses.arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
verses.english: So whoever does an atom\'s weight of good will see it,

verses.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
verses.english: And whoever does an atom\'s weight of evil will see it.

verses.arabic: فَٱلْمُورِيَـٰتِ قَدْحًا
verses.english: And the producers of sparks [when] striking

verses.arabic: فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِۦ نَقْعًا
verses.english: Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust,

verses.arabic: فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِۦ جَمْعًا
verses.english: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌ
verses.english: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٌ
verses.english: And indeed, he is to that a witness.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلْخَيْرِ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.english: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.

verses.arabic: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
verses.english: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered

verses.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ
verses.english: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.

verses.arabic: مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.english: What is the Striking Calamity?

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?

verses.arabic: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٱلْمَنفُوشِ
verses.english: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.english: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],

verses.arabic: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.english: He will be in a pleasant life.

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.english: But as for one whose scales are light,

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ
verses.english: And what can make you know what that is?

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلْهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ
verses.english: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you

verses.arabic: حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ
verses.english: Until you visit the graveyards.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: Then no! You are going to know.

verses.arabic: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.english: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...

verses.arabic: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ
verses.english: You will surely see the Hellfire.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.english: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.english: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.

verses.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
verses.english: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ
verses.english: Woe to every scorner and mocker

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ
verses.english: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.

verses.arabic: يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ
verses.english: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.

verses.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ
verses.english: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?

verses.arabic: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ
verses.english: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,

verses.arabic: ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ
verses.english: Which mounts directed at the hearts.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌ
verses.english: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them

verses.arabic: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍ
verses.english: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?

verses.arabic: تَرْمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٍ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
verses.english: Striking them with stones of hard clay,

verses.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُمْ كَعَصْفٍ مَّأْكُولٍۭ
verses.english: And He made them like eaten straw.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ
verses.english: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -

verses.arabic: إِۦلَـٰفِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ
verses.english: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -

verses.arabic: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ
verses.english: Let them worship the Lord of this House,

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
verses.english: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.english: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?

verses.arabic: فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يَدُعُّ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
verses.english: For that is the one who drives away the orphan

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.english: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ
verses.english: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ
verses.english: Those who make show [of their deeds]

verses.arabic: وَيَمْنَعُونَ ٱلْمَاعُونَ
verses.english: And withhold [simple] assistance.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ
verses.english: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar.

verses.arabic: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ
verses.english: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].

verses.arabic: لَآ أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.english: I do not worship what you worship.

verses.arabic: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
verses.english: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.

verses.arabic: وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ
verses.english: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.

verses.arabic: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
verses.english: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.

verses.arabic: لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ
verses.english: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
verses.english: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,

verses.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.english: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
verses.english: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ
verses.english: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.

verses.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
verses.english: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.

verses.arabic: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ
verses.english: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame

verses.arabic: فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ
verses.english: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
verses.english: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One,

verses.arabic: لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
verses.english: He neither begets nor is born,

verses.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌۢ
verses.english: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
verses.english: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak

verses.arabic: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
verses.english: From the evil of that which He created

verses.arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
verses.english: And from the evil of darkness when it settles

verses.arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَـٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ
verses.english: And from the evil of the blowers in knots

verses.arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
verses.english: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.english: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,

verses.arabic: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
verses.english: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -

verses.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
verses.english: From among the jinn and mankind."
